idea-plugin.name: Editor Peer Bridge
idea-plugin.description:
Editor Peer Bridge is a local cross-editor navigation bridge for Rider, VS Code, Cursor, and CodeBuddy.

Use one action to send the current file and selection to a matching peer editor in the same workspace. The plugin supports multi-target routing, an "All" broadcast option, automatic project configuration, Rider solution detection, and multiple editor instances.

Communication stays on localhost; file paths and selections are not uploaded to external services.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.0.4

  • Added JetBrains Marketplace publishing support and repeatable package artifacts.
  • Added Rider .sln / .slnx auto-detection for better multi-solution routing.
  • Improved marketplace metadata, plugin ID metadata, and release version synchronization.
  • Redacted marketplace tokens in release logs.

action.text: Editor Peer Bridge: Jump To Peer
action.description: Send current file and selection to a matching peer instance
